completed_tasks: Reintroduced skills/ai-team-supervisor as an operational routing skill instead of an installer/template package.
Defined Supervisor-owned routing rules, agent dispatch, sub-skill dispatch, state writes, and script boundaries in skills/ai-team-supervisor/SKILL.md.
Updated AGENTS.md, agents/supervisor.md, skills/README.md, docs/ai-team-mvp.md, and website-workflow so website edits route through ai-team-supervisor first.
Demoted npm run ai:route to an advisory helper that prints a deterministic suggestion and does not write run.json.
Updated actions/route-and-validate and action docs to describe ai:route as advisory.
notes: Product runtime UI code was not changed.
The actual cross-repo installer files and copied template assets remain deleted.
ai:route no longer mutates run.json; $ai-team-supervisor owns routing judgment.
